notableEvents.label: Joey Wiemer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Joey Wiemer grounds into a double play, shortstop David Hamilton to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. CJ Abrams out at 2nd. Joey Wiemer out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: CJ Abrams GIDP
notableEvents.detail: CJ Abrams grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop David Hamilton to first baseman Jake Bauers. Brady House out at 2nd. CJ Abrams out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: CJ Abrams rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: CJ Abrams grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop David Hamilton to first baseman Jake Bauers. Brady House out at 2nd. CJ Abrams out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jacob Young pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Young doubles (3) on a fly ball to right fielder Sal Frelick. Luis García Jr. scores. Jacob Young out at 3rd on the throw, right fielder Sal Frelick to second baseman Brice Turang to third baseman Luis Rengifo.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jorbit Vivas hits a sacrifice bunt. Joey Wiemer scores. Jorbit Vivas to 1st. Throwing error by pitcher Trevor Megill.
